summary: Comprehensive Phase 3 end-to-end testing completed for Yeşil Dükkan. Backend: 58/58 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All Phase 3 features working - wishlist, reviews, coupons, blog CMS, AI integrations, admin panels. Turkish content consistent throughout.
passed_tests: Backend: Health check and taxonomy with 7 pot_sizes values
Backend: All Phase 2 features (27 tests) still working
Backend: Wishlist toggle (add/remove), get wishlist, get wishlist IDs
Backend: Reviews create (auth required), get reviews (public, approved only), admin list/approve
Backend: Coupons create (3 types: percentage/fixed_amount/free_shipping), validate, update, delete
Backend: Checkout with coupon code applies discount correctly
Backend: Blog create, publish (sets published_at), list (published only), get detail
Backend: AI Blog SEO endpoint (1 real Mistral call - working)
Backend: Sitemap.xml includes blog URLs
Frontend: Home page loads with all features
Frontend: ProductCard wishlist heart icon present, redirects to login if not logged in
Frontend: WishlistPage shows login prompt when not logged in
Frontend: Wishlist toggle working for logged in users
Frontend: ProductPage Reviews tab displays review form and list
Frontend: CareBento displays pot_size card when product has pot_size
Frontend: BlogListPage displays published blog posts
Frontend: CheckoutPage coupon input and apply button working
Frontend: Header Blog link present
Frontend: AdminAIAdd page - product name input, upload input, AI analyze button (disabled without file)
Frontend: AdminReviews page - 3 tabs (Pending/Approved/Rejected)
Frontend: AdminCoupons page - new coupon button, dialog with 3 types
Frontend: AdminBlog list page - shows published posts
Frontend: AdminBlogEditor - title input, EditorJS holder, AI SEO button, save/publish buttons
Frontend: AdminLayout navigation - Yorumlar, Kuponlar, Blog links present

ai_product_add.details: AdminAIAdd page has product_name input + upload input. AI analyze button disabled without both fields. Backend accepts product_name in multipart form (auth tested only - no expensive AI calls made as instructed).

pot_size.details: pot_sizes array has 7 values (5.5/8.5/10.5/12/15/17/21 CM). Field added to product model, filters, and CareBento displays it when present.

wishlist.details: ProductCard heart icon present. Toggle adds/removes from wishlist (auth required). /hesap/favorilerim page shows login prompt or products. Backend endpoints all working.

reviews.details: ProductPage has Reviews tab. Users can submit reviews (pending status). Admin can moderate at /admin/yorumlar with 3 tabs. Public endpoint returns approved only.

coupons.details: Admin can create 3 types of coupons (percentage/fixed_amount/free_shipping). Checkout validates and applies coupons. /admin/kuponlar has full CRUD.

blog_cms.details: Public /blog list and /blog/:slug detail working. Admin /admin/blog list + /admin/blog/yeni editor with EditorJS. Status change draft→published sets published_at. Sitemap includes blog URLs.

editorjs.details: EditorJS holder present in blog editor. Supports header/paragraph/list/quote/code/image blocks. Image upload endpoint working.

ai_blog_seo.details: AI SEO Öner button in blog editor. Makes real Mistral text-only call (cheaper). Returns meta_title, meta_description, slug, tags, outline. Tested with 1 real call as instructed.

google_analytics.details: REACT_APP_GA_ID is empty, so GA is no-op (correct behavior). Integration code present in analytics.js.

additional_notes.demo_accounts: Admin: admin@yesildukkan.com / Admin1234!, Customer: demo@yesildukkan.com / Demo1234! - both working
additional_notes.demo_data: 5 products seeded, 1 blog post created and published during testing, 3 coupons created, 1 review created and approved
additional_notes.ai_integration: AI analyze endpoint auth tested only (no real PlantNet/Mistral calls - expensive). AI Blog SEO tested with 1 real Mistral call (text-only, cheaper) as instructed.
additional_notes.payment_integration: İyzico sandbox working, coupon discount applied correctly in checkout
additional_notes.turkish_content: All UI text in Turkish, consistent throughout application including new Phase 3 features
additional_notes.seo: Sitemap.xml now includes blog URLs, robots.txt working
additional_notes.theme: Green/white theme with 10px border-radius maintained across all new features
